properties.Observation: A landslide area. Residents of 5 homes have been evacuated.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: It is advisable to take NBRO recommendations and take appropriate action. Land use planning and SALT system as Live fence and Stone terraces to be constructed for soil conservation

properties.Adoption of Disaster Conservation Measur: Removal of risky houses and Providing suitable land
properties.Observation: A landslide area, There are about 20 houses on an area of about 20 acres, and people live in those houses and do farming in this lands.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: It is advisable to take NBRO recommendations and take appropriate action. Land use planning and SALT system as Live fence and Stone terraces to be constructed for soil conservation

properties.Disaster Area: The lands in the Eastern direction from Mrs. Somawathi's house to Wlapane-Ragala Road
